story.title: Neon Requiem
story.logline: A troubled cyberpunk detective must navigate the dark underbelly of the city to uncover the truth behind a string of mysterious disappearances.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: We meet our troubled cyberpunk detective, Kael, as he navigates the dark streets of the city, haunted by his past. We also meet his new partner, Lyra, a brilliant hacker with a hidden agenda.

acts.label: Confrontation
acts.description: Kael and Lyra delve deeper into the mystery of the disappearances, uncovering a web of corruption and deceit that reaches the highest echelons of power. They must navigate treacherous alliances and rivalries to get to the truth.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: Kael and Lyra finally uncover the shocking truth behind the disappearances, but it leads them to a devastating confrontation with the mastermind behind the sinister plot.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: Kael and Lyra must come to terms with the consequences of their discovery and decide whether to take down the corrupt system or protect themselves and their loved ones.

story.world: The city is a labyrinth of neon-lit skyscrapers, cramped alleyways, and virtual reality landscapes, where the boundaries between reality and fantasy are constantly blurred.
